posts.title: Welcome to TechSteal Season 5!
posts.author: TechSteal
posts.body:
Season 5 is officially live! Expect fresh events, new rewards, and updated community goals.

What's new this season:

  • New seasonal quests
  • Fresh community events
  • Updated server rules

Jump in at play.techsteal.net and join the fun!

posts.title: Server Rules Updated
posts.author: TechSteal
posts.body:
We've updated our server rules for Season 5. Please review them in our Discord before playing.

Key changes include updated PvP guidelines and new building restrictions near spawn.
